MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION (FORM & SPECIAL INTERROGS); SANCTIONS REQUEST; PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO REQ. FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ROETZER, MICHAEL E. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS ADMINISTRATOR, MANAGEMENT SERVICE AND SUPPORT, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR MAR-17-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO DEFENDANTS' FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND DEMANDS FOR INSPECTION, AND PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES IS GRANTED. LATE OPPOSITION HAS BEEN CONSIDERED. THE COURT WILL NOT ASSUME THAT RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED PRIOR TO THIS HEARING. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE LATE RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE FAILURE TO COMMUNICATE ANY HEALTH PROBLEMS AND THE FAILURE TO MAKE ANY FURTHER CONTACT WITH DEFENDANT TO EXPLAIN THE REASONS FOR THE DELAY MADE THE MOTION NECESSARY. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $375, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
